text.title: Quality-Attribute Trade-off Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Conflict named as 'security vs usability', no scenarios cited.
antipattern.fix: Require scenario id references for each conflict.

antipattern.symptom: Report names only one conflict; multi-attribute systems usually have more.
antipattern.fix: Walk all attribute pairs; require ≥2 conflicts or explicit 'aligned' non-risks.

antipattern.symptom: Conflict described but no architectural element flagged as sensitivity point.
antipattern.fix: Annotate architecture diagram with sensitivity-point markers.
Quantify with measurable thresholds; reject otherwise.
